name: Peanutters
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Chopped Peanuts, Coconut or Sprinkles
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine powdered sugar, peanut butter, butter and vanilla in a large bowl; beat until well-blended.
2. Shape the mixture by tablespoonfuls into peanut shapes or balls; arrange on cookie sheets and refrigerate in Ziploc jumbo storage bags until firm, 3 to 4 hours.
3. Melt chocolate chips over low heat in a small saucepan. Using a toothpick, dip half of each peanut shape or ball in chocolate; roll dipped half in nuts, coconut or sprinkles and return to the cookie sheet. Refrigerate for 1 hour.
4. Carefully remove candies from the cookie sheet; refrigerate in gallon-size Ziploc storage bags no longer than 2 weeks. Serve chilled.
